name: The Slagworks Crew
description: A hard scavenging crew that took the Ironworks foundry for its walls and its tools. They strip what they find, owe nobody, and reckon a stranger is either muscle or salvage — a reputation the honest ones among them can't quite shake.
notes: T53 · Ironworks. Hostile crew (gus never joins). Two cross-faction grudges between RECRUITABLE survivors, so both bite at the base: hector↔sarah and dana↔marcus — recruit either pair and the rivalry grinds shelter morale (FR-NPC-07).
